task_completion.description: Verify that the two new clients have been created in the Time Management module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Dept of Health and Human Services' and 'Oak Foundation' in the Clients list or grid within the Time Management module.

task_completion.description: Verify that both new clients are set to Active status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an 'Active' status indicator or badge next to both 'Dept of Health and Human Services' and 'Oak Foundation' in the Clients list.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation and configuration of the 'Youth Mental Health Initiative' project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Youth Mental Health Initiative' in the Projects list. It should display 'Dept of Health and Human Services' as the client, list EMP006 and EMP012 as assigned employees, and show an 'Active' status.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation and configuration of the 'Substance Abuse Recovery' project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Substance Abuse Recovery' in the Projects list. It should display 'Dept of Health and Human Services' as the client, list EMP013 as the assigned employee, and show an 'Active' status.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation and configuration of the 'Housing First Program' project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Housing First Program' in the Projects list. It should display 'Oak Foundation' as the client, list EMP018 as the assigned employee, and show an 'Active' status.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the web browser navigating the Sentrifugo Time Management interface, with forms being filled out or lists being displayed, rather than just a text editor showing the memo.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show terminal windows executing SQL commands, curl requests, or python scripts to insert the data directly into the database.

integrity.description: Verify the data was actually entered into the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for confirmation messages (e.g., 'Record saved successfully') or the newly added records appearing in the application's native data tables, rather than mocked HTML edits.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Clients: 'Dept of Health and Human Services' and 'Oak Foundation'. Expected Projects: 1) 'Youth Mental Health Initiative' linked to 'Dept of Health and Human Services' with employees EMP006 and EMP012. 2) 'Substance Abuse Recovery' linked to 'Dept of Health and Human Services' with employee EMP013. 3) 'Housing First Program' linked to 'Oak Foundation' with employee EMP018. All client and project records must be explicitly set to 'Active'.
